intended_use: The SIGNA Prime is a whole body magnetic resonance scanner designed to support high resolution, high signal-to-noise ratio, and short scan times. It is indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging device
intended_use_full: The SIGNA Prime is a whole body magnetic resonance scanner designed to support high resolution, high signal-to-noise ratio, and short scan times. It is indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging device to produce axial, sagittal, coronal, and oblique images, spectroscopic images, parametric maps, and/or spectra, dynamic images of the structures and/or functions of the entire body, including, but not limited to, head, neck, TMJ, spine, breast, heart, abdomen, pelvis, joints, prostate, blood vessels, and musculoskeletal regions of the body.
ground_truth: Predicate device (SIGNA Creator, K143251) image quality
other_metrics: Image quality substantially equivalent to predicate device; compliance with ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1, IEC 60601-1-2, IEC 60601-2-33, IEC 62304, IEC 60601-1-6, IEC 62366-1, ISO 10993-1, NEMA MS standards for MRI, and NEMA PS3 standard for DICOM
